hero.headline: Classical music, modern community.
hero.subhead: We are dedicated to fostering a vibrant cultural environment, supporting musical education, and ensuring that the joy of orchestral performances is accessible to all.

intro.heading: Bringing live orchestral music to the Eastside.
body: Founded in 2024 by musicians working in tech, the Redmond Tech Orchestra exists so working adults can keep playing — and so the community we live in can hear it.
All of our concerts are free or low-cost. Bring a friend. Bring your kids. Just come.
